game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Rounds is a 1v1 rogue-lite shooter where each round gets more intense. The losing player of each round unlocks clever upgrades to create a better build to counter their opponent.

Wave your noodle arms around to assert dominance!

Experience hype-filled dueling! Shoot, block, and jump your way to victory with your shotgun-rocket-launcher-that-shoots-heat-seeking-bouncy-missiles or one of the other over 11.2 million different powerup combinations.

Features
  • 65+ Unique powerups
  • 70+ Maps
  • AAA Face Customizer
  • Online Multiplayer
  • Local Multiplayer
  • Twitch based matchmaking
  • 100% organic Noodle Arms
game_info.description: Battle against an AI opponent in intense 1v1 arena combat! Win rounds by depleting your opponent's health to zero. After each round, the loser gets to choose powerful upgrades to enhance their abilities. First to win 3 rounds claims victory! Master shooting, dodging, and strategic upgrade selection to dominate the arena.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character around the arena
Space: Shoot projectiles at your opponent
Shift: Activate shield to block incoming projectiles
Z: Dash quickly in the direction you're facing
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause the game
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat mechanics test. Validates that the player can move around the arena, shoot projectiles, and that basic collision detection works properly. Tests that the game responds to all control inputs correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player in all directions to test movement boundaries. Fire projectiles periodically to test shooting mechanics. Use shield and dash abilities to validate they activate correctly. Engage with the enemy to test collision detection.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly within arena bounds, projectiles should spawn and travel correctly, shield should activate when used, dash should provide quick movement boost. The game should handle all inputs without errors and maintain stable gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition validation test. Tests the complete game loop including round victories, upgrade selection, and ultimately winning the match by being first to win 3 rounds. Validates that the GAME_OVER_WIN state is reached correctly.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implement aggressive offensive strategy focusing on accurate shooting while maintaining safe distance. Prioritize damage-increasing upgrades when available. Use dash to dodge enemy projectiles and maintain advantageous positioning. Focus fire on enemy until health depletes.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully win individual rounds by depleting enemy health. Navigate upgrade selection screens. Ultimately win 3 rounds before the opponent to trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. The game should properly track round wins and transition to victory screen.

TEST_3.test_description: Defensive mechanics and survival test. Validates shield blocking, dash evasion, and the ability to survive multiple rounds even when losing initially. Tests the upgrade system from the losing player's perspective.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Use defensive play focusing on shield blocks and evasive dashing. Intentionally lose first round to test upgrade selection interface. Choose defensive upgrades like health, shield duration, or movement speed. Test that upgrades persist across rounds.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Shield should successfully block projectiles. Dash should provide invulnerability frames or quick escape. Upgrade selection should appear after losing a round. Selected upgrades should enhance player stats in subsequent rounds. Game should handle round transitions smoothly.
